final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night.

Style/medium: needs a "赛博朋克" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Blade Runner film cinematography, Akira anime neo-Tokyo cityscapes, Ghost in the Shell urban environments; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include towering skyscrapers as vertical elements, flying vehicles in mid-air motion
Subject: must include flying vehicles穿梭 among buildings, rain falling from sky, puddles on ground reflecting lights
Scene/backdrop: must include a dense futuristic city at night with towering high-rise buildings, neon lights闪烁 throughout
Lighting/mood: needs a neon-lit night atmosphere with a sense of technological advancement and urban decay — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be blue-purple dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a wet reflective surface treatment for ground puddles — exact sheen and water texture is yours
